title: Agent CLI Local Cold/Warm Message
objective: Send cold and warm simple messages through `openclaw agent --local`, verify mock-provider responses, and attribute latency before, during, and after provider work.

phases.title: Provision Agent Env
phases.intent: Create a disposable OpenClaw env before wiring the model provider and sending local agent messages.

phases.title: Cold Agent Turn
phases.intent: Send the first simple message through OpenClaw's real local embedded agent CLI command in a fresh session.
commands: ocm @{env} -- agent --local --agent main --session-id kova-agent-cold-warm --message 'Reply with exact ASCII text KOVA_AGENT_OK only.' --thinking off --timeout 120 --json

phases.title: Warm Agent Turn
phases.intent: Send the same simple message in the same session to prove whether cold discovery/cache work disappears.
commands: ocm @{env} -- agent --local --agent main --session-id kova-agent-cold-warm --message 'Reply with exact ASCII text KOVA_AGENT_OK only.' --thinking off --timeout 120 --json

phases.title: Post-Agent Env Status
phases.intent: Verify the env remains usable after both local agent turns and capture plugin diagnostics.
